mapper.select: SELECT id, label, quantity, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM procurement_presets WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, label, quantity, is_active, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM procurement_presets WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE procurement_presets SET is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
